checks.note: startRoomAnimationFromDraft must not call stopAnimation as a side-effect.
Start path must not upsert by (type, roomId) — would implicitly replace a running animation.
Fresh triggers go through createAnimation(...) and additive insertion.
stop-animation emission is only allowed inside the explicit editTargetId cluster-reuse branch.
Operator-initiated edit-target overwrite must remain available (not in scope of P12-T3).
